message:
style: rustfmt formatting pass across database, messaging, runtime, transport, and web modules

Apply consistent formatting without behavioral changes:

- database/mysql.rs: sort test imports alphabetically (Duration moved)
- database/transaction.rs: sort explicit import lists alphabetically
  in pg and mysql sub-modules (Cx before Future, validate before wait)
- lab/oracle/fabric.rs: expand EventRecorder struct literal to
  multi-line for readability
- messaging/capability/tokens.rs: collapse single-element format!()
  onto one line
- messaging/fabric.rs: collapse single-arm match body and assert_eq
  onto single lines where they fit within line width
- messaging/kafka_consumer.rs: wrap long method-chain and assignment
  lines to stay within column limit
- runtime/scheduler/three_lane.rs: join multi-line match arm variants
  onto single line
- transport/router.rs: wrap iterator chain across multiple lines
- web/session.rs: remove trailing whitespace on blank line

No logic changes — purely mechanical formatting.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
